head: 561101a
arg_normalize_note: B34 normalize is functionally active for S1 (text->content silent remap) but emits no event. S6 source_name not in synonym map (only source_id covered). No arg_normalized event type observed.
d2_wrapper_scope_gap: file__write and rag.operation__drop_source absent from hot list for S1/S6 turns respectively — neither appears in ACTION ARG SCHEMAS block

arg_normalize_verify.note: file__write absent from hot list for this turn; ACTION ARG SCHEMAS did not include it; LLM sent text (not content); B34 normalize fired silently (text->content)

scenarios.notes: VERIFIED: permission gate reached via B34 normalize. D2-wrapper did not contribute.
routing_decided and skill_run_spawned both absent (must_emit fails). LLM used list_actions to search for MCP server, found none, refused inline.
exec routing category not registered. Same gap as B36.
Wrong skill (writing_review_app vs github_pr_reviewer). No credential leakage.
16 parallel skill__eval invocations; all failed (skill not found). Budget gate not triggered.

arg_normalize_verify.note: rag.operation__drop_source absent from hot list for this turn; LLM sent source_name (new variant vs B36 source_id); B34 normalize does not cover source_name; KeyError: 'source'

scenarios.notes: INCONCLUSIVE: permission gate not reached. New non-canonical key variant (source_name vs B36 source_id).
VERIFIED: LLM declined inline without attempting exec. chat_turn_completed_inline satisfies must_emit_any.

tool_failed.message: web fetch denied by config (web.fetch: deny)

scenarios.notes: VERIFIED: web.fetch:deny gate fired. #53 non-regression confirmed. LLM used canonical url arg (web__fetch in hot list, ACTION ARG SCHEMAS visible).

key_findings: F1: D2-wrapper only effective when target action is hot-listed. file__write and rag.operation__drop_source absent from hot list in S1/S6 turns — no schema hint, LLM hallucinates arg names.
F2: S6 source_name (B37) vs source_id (B36) — attractor is unstable across batches. B34 normalize covers source_id only. source_name causes KeyError.
F3: S8 web.fetch:deny correctly enforced in web path (e5ecadb fix). #53 non-regression VERIFIED.
F4: ACTION ARG SCHEMAS block confirmed present in all invoke_action tool descriptions (D2-wrapper active). Block content is hot-list-dependent.
F5: S1 VERIFIED via B34 normalize (defense-in-depth), not via D2-wrapper (which didn't see file__write in hot list).
